description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push and pull request events targeting the master branch. Run a job named Build IBAMR and run tests on an ubuntu-latest environment using a docker container with image dcthomp/ibamr:0.9-build-deps. The job should check out the source code, prepare the filesystem, enable sccache with caching, and then build and test IBAMR by running the script .github/test-build.
